jobs.title: Administrative Business Partner (12 month fixed term contract)
jobs.content: <p><strong>Administrative Business Partner</strong></p><p>Google DeepMind is the leading frontier-AI research lab pioneered around the deep-reinforcement-learning + LLM-research data model.</p>

jobs.title: Research Engineer, Applied AI
jobs.content: <p>Lead DeepMind's Research Engineer function across the frontier-AI & foundation-model platform stack.</p>
